query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a city street with ornate historic buildings lining the left side and trees along the right sidewalk. Parked cars sit along the left curb, and a few vehicles drive down the road. A pedestrian walks on the right sidewalk. Overhead wires with suspended fixtures run across the street. The view down the road fades into a bright, hazy distance.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of a city street with ornate historic buildings lining the left side and trees along the right sidewalk. Parked cars appear as dark silhouettes along the left curb, and a few vehicles drive down the road toward a fog-obscured vanishing point. A pedestrian walks on the right sidewalk. Overhead wires with suspended fixtures run across a muted, washed-out sky. The faded monotone palette and heavy fog create an oppressive atmosphere of melancholy and unease.
